title: Snap TPA
description: The Best Fast Pop-up Teleport Requests System.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TczTK1E42S0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


# **SnapTPA – Fast Pop-up Teleport Requests**  
## **Snap Series #1**

Tired of typing `/trigger tpa set <id>` and messing it up in chat?  
Hate scrolling through huge lists on busy servers?  


![TPA menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96286dfd5bbcf715ddfdcb582ce375ffed052c25.png)




Press **G**  → choose **"TPA Request"** → Click who you want to take → confirm.  
The target gets a simple **"Accept / Deny?"** pop-up.  
They say yes → you teleport right to them. No → request vanishes. Easy.


![A Clean Player Listing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/420445b380bc4ed28a1edbfc5d25cd07704e55a2.png)



## Why it rocks

- **No chat clutter** — everything happens in neat pop-ups

- **Works on huge servers** — 2 players or 100+, no laggy lists

- **Name-change proof** — uses hidden player IDs so it never breaks

- **Multi-target** - multiply teleport/accepting/denying targets compatible

- **Lightweight** — no performance hit, pure vanilla

## Quick start

- Just Press G Key

(If G key doesn't work, please check the `quick actions` key in keybind settings)

## Works with

- Minecraft Java **1.21.6+** 

- Vanilla, Paper, Purpur servers — no mods

- Plays nice with Vanilla Tweaks, homes, warps, AFK stuff

- More Snap packs coming: SnapHome, SnapWarp, SnapSpawn, etc

## Install in seconds

1. Drop the `.zip` in `world/datapacks` folder

2. `/reload`

3. Press **G** and start teleporting


Grab it, test with friends, and make multiplayer way smoother.  
Diamonds, favorites and comments fuel the whole Snap series — thanks a ton!

**Join My discord server for issues reporting and suggestions!**
